features: Dual-Purpose Mini Brush: This compact hairbrush combines a smooth-bristle detangling brush with a built-in mirror, making it easy to style your hair and check your makeup anytime, anywhere

Comfortable Design: Made from high-quality ABS material, the small hairbrush feels smooth in hand with no sharp edges. Flexible rubber bristles provide a gentle scalp massage while protecting hair health
Portable & Lightweight: Measuring 6x6x1.5 cm and lightweight, this mini flip brush fits easily in a purse, backpack, or pocket—ideal for travel, or parties
Effortless Detangling: The message design gently untangles knots and smooths hair without pulling or breakage, suitable for all hair types—thick, thin, curly, straight, long, or short
Charming Gift: Its cute pink design makes it a delightful present for girls, teens, daughters, or friends. A practical and stylish accessory that’s perfect for summer holidays or everyday use
